title: solanum boliviense subsp. astleyi
intro: Solanum boliviense subsp. astleyi, also known as Astley's Bolivian nightshade, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, and has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations, and caution should be exercised when using Astley's Bolivian nightshade due to its potential toxicity.
